channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April

item.title: Several potholes remain on Bayshill Road outside the Ladies College that are near impossible to avoid, 8th April
item.description:
Either side of the crossing outside the Ladies College
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Bayshill Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 8th April
item.description:
Sunken Gully Please rebuild level with CW Standard TM (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 8th April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please relay x1 rocking raised 600x400x20mm footway closure number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 8th April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please replace x1 broken rocking sunken 600x600x20mm footway closure (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet
